news_items.headline: Fed June 16-17 FOMC meeting: 99.5% market probability of no rate change
news_items.data_pt: Target range: 3.5-3.75% (unchanged) | Market probability of hold: 99.5% | May CPI: 4.2% YoY

news_items.headline: TSMC CEO: Global chip supply will fall short of AI demand for years
news_items.data_pt: June 4, 2026: C.C. Wei stated supply inadequacy persists | Production capacity remains key bottleneck | Will avoid price hikes seen in memory sector

news_items.headline: HBM (High-Bandwidth Memory) capacity pre-committed through 2026-2027
news_items.data_pt: IDC: Most HBM capacity already allocated through 2026-2027 | Concentrated in NVIDIA/AMD GPUs + hyperscaler custom silicon | New supply won't arrive until late 2026

news_items.headline: Global semiconductor market forecast to reach $1.29T in 2026 (+52.8% YoY)
news_items.data_pt: IDC 2026 forecast: $1.29 trillion (+52.8%) | AI infrastructure + memory + hyperscaler CapEx drive growth | Market shifting from cyclical recovery to structurally constrained
